name: sec-review
description: Cybersecurity review plugin for web services and servers: a pipelined four-agent architecture (sec-expert, finding-triager, cve-enricher, report-writer) with model pinning — sonnet-grade code reasoning, haiku-grade CVE feed I/O. Citation-grounded expertise across databases, frameworks, webservers, proxies, frontend, auth, TLS, containers, secrets, and supply-chain; live CVE enrichment from NVD 2.0, OSV.dev, and GHSA; prioritized markdown report with reliable, primary-source-cited fixes.
